about.label: Background
about.title: ABOUT
about.bio1: A fullstack engineer focused on building scalable digital infrastructure. With a background spanning distributed systems, frontend architecture, and cloud-native platforms, I approach every project as an exercise in intentional design.
about.bio2: My work is guided by a belief that great engineering is indistinguishable from great design — both demand clarity, restraint, and an obsessive attention to the details that most people never notice.
about.approachBody: Systems thinking over feature stacking. Every architectural decision is made with long-term maintainability and operational excellence in mind. I build infrastructure that scales silently.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: CONTACT
contact.body: Available for select projects and collaborations. Reach out to discuss how we can build something exceptional together.
